mapper.insert: insert into schedule(class_id, course_id, teacher_id, day_of_week, period, classroom) values(#{classId}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{period}, #{classroom})
mapper.update: update schedule set class_id = #{classId}, course_id = #{courseId}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek}, period = #{period}, classroom = #{classroom} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select s.id, s.class_id as classId, c.name as className, s.course_id as courseId, co.name as courseName, s.teacher_id as teacherId, e.name as teacherName, s.day_of_week as dayOfWeek, s.period, s.classroom from schedule s left join clazz c on s.class_id = c.id left join course co on s.course_id = co.id left join employee e on s.teacher_id = e.id where s.id = #{id}

select s.id, s.class_id as classId, c.name as className, s.course_id as courseId, co.name as courseName, s.teacher_id as teacherId, e.name as teacherName, s.day_of_week as dayOfWeek, s.period, s.classroom from schedule s left join clazz c on s.class_id = c.id left join course co on s.course_id = co.id left join employee e on s.teacher_id = e.id

select s.id, s.class_id as classId, c.name as className, s.course_id as courseId, co.name as courseName, s.teacher_id as teacherId, e.name as teacherName, s.day_of_week as dayOfWeek, s.period, s.classroom from schedule s left join clazz c on s.class_id = c.id left join course co on s.course_id = co.id left join employee e on s.teacher_id = e.id
and c.name like concat('%', #{className}, '%')
and co.name like concat('%', #{courseName}, '%')
and e.name like concat('%', #{teacherName}, '%')
and s.day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek}
mapper.delete: delete from schedule where class_id in (select id from clazz where grade_id = #{gradeId})
delete from schedule where teacher_id in (select id from employee where department_id = #{departmentId})
